creator: maciphone2@googlemail.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #46)
<<<I've no evidence that u-boot can be told to retry UEFI
initialization after its first failure. But I'm no
u-boot expert.>>>

hint:
at first trial you can interrupt to the u-boot-prompt 
and type :
`usb start`

give a question mark ( ? ) for further command options...

... 'printenv' shows current setup...
'setenv xyz' to overwrite settings....
just for a first hint...
